title: Terraform / OpenTofu
description: Infrastructure as Code fundamentals using Terraform/OpenTofu — reading HCL configs, writing your own, and running the full plan/apply/destroy lifecycle.

exercises.title: Reading Terraform Config Files
exercises.description: Understand HCL syntax, providers, resources, variables, outputs, and state by analyzing a real-world AWS-style configuration.

exercises.title: Writing a Terraform Configuration
exercises.description: Write a complete Terraform config using the local provider, then run init and plan.

exercises.title: Modify, Plan, Apply, Destroy
exercises.description: Experience the full Terraform workflow: modify an existing config, inspect the diff with plan, apply changes, and tear down with destroy.
